name: Amsterdam West — Sloterdijk Industrial
notes: High industrial electrification demand. Data centres + EV logistics fleet charging.

name: Amsterdam Noord — NDSM Wharf
notes: Creative industry cluster + growing residential EV charging demand.

name: Rotterdam Maasvlakte — Port Industrial Zone
notes: Port electrification (shore power for shipping). One of highest congestion nodes in NL.

name: Rotterdam Centrum — Alexanderpolder
notes: Mixed residential-commercial. Solar feed-in congestion during summer peaks.

name: Eindhoven — High Tech Campus
notes: ASML + Philips R&D expansion. Semiconductor manufacturing electrification.

name: Groningen — Eemshaven Energy Port
notes: Wind energy feed-in excess. Hydrogen electrolysis projects seeking capacity.

name: Utrecht — Lage Weide Industrial
notes: Moderate demand. Some capacity available. HV substation recently upgraded.

name: Haarlem — Waarderpolder Business Park
notes: Mixed industrial park. EV fleet depot seeking additional feed-in capacity.

name: Den Haag — Binckhorst
notes: Redevelopment zone. New grid capacity recently installed. Low current utilisation.

name: Tilburg — Logistics Zone Katsbogten
notes: Amazon + Zalando distribution. EV fleet charging surge. Waiting list 18+ months.
